title: HOUSING CASE MANAGEMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: EASTERSEALS OREGON WASHINGTON COUNTY HOUSING CASE MANAGEMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management with housing assistance that helps individuals identify career skills and goals. Refers participants to career assistance programs via Easterseals Oregon programs and outside agencies so they can build a stable income and retain their new home. 11950 SW Garden Place #100 Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: -Age 55 or older -Individual must be either homeless or at imminent risk of homelessness -Individual must be currently located or living in Washington County Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm, by appointment only (971) 317-9685 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 317-9685 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Case/Care Management * Housing Issues Case/Care Management * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERSEALS OREGON WASHINGTON COUNTY
